UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CERTIFICATEHOLDERS OF BANC OF AMERICA FUNDING CORPORATION, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, ROSA PONCE, CORINA PONCE, CARLOS ALVAREZ, JESSICA NEGRETE, JASMINE BARRERA, SERGIO DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 38 CARR STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, ROSA PONCE, CORINA PONCE, CARLOS ALVAREZ, JESSICA NEGRETE, JASMINE BARRERA, SERGIO DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
